payload.summary_zh: Qonhub AI 2.4.0 全系统workspace多租户隔离，客户端发布工作台+AI数据大屏+竞争力报告，自动跑词引擎+B2B分步注册向导+RPA管道，AI暗色主题UI升级(WebGL流体渐变+光线叠加+磁吸卡片)，11平台统一授权管理，Kimi收录优化+头条快速收录模板。
payload.summary_en: Qonhub AI 2.4.0: Full workspace isolation, client publish workbench, AI data dashboard + competitiveness report, auto keyword runner, B2B step registration wizard + RPA pipeline, AI dark theme UI (WebGL gradient + floating lines + magnet cards), 11-platform unified auth management, Kimi + Toutiao indexing optimization templates.
payload.upgrade_tip_zh: 升级后执行 php artisan migrate、php artisan optimize:clear，重启RPA引擎(node rpa-engine/server.js)，重启队列worker。新版本文章自动去Markdown标记，GEO增强仅<70分触发，欢迎弹窗不再弹出。
payload.upgrade_tip_en: After upgrading, run php artisan migrate, php artisan optimize:clear, restart RPA engine and queue workers. New articles auto-strip Markdown, GEO enhancement only triggers below score 70, welcome modal suppressed.
